review_text: The result of my case was not what Mr. Patel led me to expect. I understand outcomes aren't guaranteed but the disconnect between early expectations and reality was significant.
Attorney Walsh got the job done but barely. I had to repeat myself multiple times and felt like I wasn't a priority. For the money I paid I expected more attentiveness.
owner_response: Thank you for taking the time to share this. Client communication is something we continuously work to improve.

review_text: I felt like just a file number to Attorney Brooks. Got my matter resolved, but the experience left a lot to be desired in terms of personal attention and empathy.

Ms. Okonkwo handled my case but the billing was confusing and I felt overcharged for routine phone calls. The outcome was acceptable but I left feeling like I was nickel-and-dimed throughout the process.
Months went by with no meaningful progress. Attorney Brooks always had a reason for the delays but it got old fast. Eventually things worked out but the timeline was unacceptable.
I felt dismissed during consultations with Ms. Reyes. My questions were answered quickly without much depth. The case resolved okay but I never felt confident in the representation.
owner_response: We're sorry to hear you felt this way. We strive to make every client feel heard and supported throughout their matter.

review_text: The attorney handling my divorce case through their office was technically skilled but emotionally cold. Going through a divorce is already devastating — I needed more compassion than I got.
Had a frustrating experience with this firm. The attorney seemed competent but communication was poor. I often had to chase them down for updates. Took much longer than expected.
The legal work was fine but their team overcharged and was slow to respond to emails. I've worked with other attorneys who were more proactive. Wouldn't use them again.
Solid but not spectacular. Attorney Brooks handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
the practice handled my matter adequately. The attorney was knowledgeable but seemed stretched thin between cases. Not bad, not great — right in the middle.
Communication was hit or miss with the practice. When I could get someone on the phone they were helpful, but getting to that point sometimes took longer than it should. Results were acceptable.
I hired Mr. Harris for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
Average experience. Ms. Okonkwo was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
owner_response: We take billing transparency seriously and are happy to walk through any invoice in detail. Please don't hesitate to reach out.

review_text: Three stars feels right. Mr. Patel was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
The good: Ms. Goldstein clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
owner_response: We appreciate the honest feedback. We are actively working on improving our response times for all client communications.

review_text: Ms. Thompson did okay work on my case. Nothing exceptional but nothing terrible either. Communication was average and the outcome was roughly what I expected. Decent but not memorable.
I got what I hired their office for but the process was bumpier than it needed to be. A few miscommunications along the way made things stressful. Outcome was fine.
Mixed experience with their office. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
owner_response: Thank you for sharing a balanced perspective. We're committed to providing consistent quality across our entire team.

review_text: The good: Mr. Patel clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
